dialogues.text: The account is low. I've been covering things I can't cover. I just need a hundred.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I've been doing this alone for a while. I don't know if you've noticed.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. I'll figure it out. I always figure it out.

dialogues.text: You look pale. You've looked pale for weeks. Don't — I'm not asking about it. Just the hundred.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I'm not going to ask about the rest today.
dialogues.no_response: I know. It's fine. I said I'd handle it.

dialogues.text: I made an appointment I shouldn't have. I can't cancel it. A hundred would cover it.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll tell you what it was for when I get back. Maybe.
dialogues.no_response: I'll cancel it. It can wait. I'm getting good at that.

dialogues.text: I haven't said what I want to say in a long time. I know that. Just — a hundred.
dialogues.yes_response: I'm going to figure out how to say it. I will. I just need a little more time.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. It can wait. It's been waiting.

dialogues.text: I called your doctor. They said to call them. You didn't tell me that. I need a hundred.
dialogues.yes_response: I'm not going to pretend I didn't hear it. You should've told me.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. Okay. I'm not going to push.

dialogues.text: I've been sleeping on my side of the bed. I don't know when that started. A hundred.
dialogues.yes_response: I'm not trying to make this about me. I just — I needed to say that.
dialogues.no_response: I know. I know you can't right now.

dialogues.text: I bought something for the house. I thought it would help. I need the hundred back.
dialogues.yes_response: I wanted something to feel normal. Just one thing. I thought that might do it.
dialogues.no_response: I'll return it. Things don't have to be the same as they were.

dialogues.text: I've been thinking about what comes after. I'm not ready to talk about it. Just the hundred.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. We'll talk about the rest when I can.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. I know you're tired. I know.

dialogues.text: I don't know how to do this. Any of it. A hundred would help with the part I can control.
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. I love you. I don't know if I've been saying it enough.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. I love you. That's not conditional on the money.

dialogues.text: I'm not going to say goodbye today. I'm just asking for a hundred. That's all this is.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. That's all this is. We're not doing anything else today.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. Okay. I'll be here when you get back.
